__comments.purpose: Maps bullet tier/construction to tolerances used by GUI uncertainty calculators.

fields.tier: One of match | mil_spec | commercial | budget; each holds per-dimension tolerances.
fields.construction: One of hpbt | polymer_tip | solid | monolithic | fmj | plated | jhp | soft_tip | wc | cast; may override tier tolerances.
fields.mass_gr: Bullet mass tolerance in grains; keep to 2 decimal digits (GUI displays %.2f).
fields.length_mm: Bullet length tolerance in millimeters; keep to 2 decimal digits (GUI displays %.2f).
fields.caliber_in: Bullet diameter tolerance in inches; keep to 4 decimal digits (GUI displays %.4f).
fields.bc_fraction: Relative BC fractional sigma; keep to 3 decimal digits (GUI displays %.3f).
fields.tier_override: Optional object that replaces tier tolerances for the listed construction; same fields/precision as tier entries.
